summary: Homepage performance rose to 69 (LCP 6.30 s) but remains persistently below 85 with no structural fix applied; /about is still an empty placeholder with SEO at 83 (below threshold); /projects and note-structurer slipped slightly below 85 in performance while screenshot-to-primevue holds at 82.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 63 → 69 (+6 pts — partial recovery, still persistently below 85 threshold)
/ lcp_ms 6451 → 6298 (-153 ms, within jitter, still critically slow above 6 s)
/projects/note-structurer performance 83 → 68 (-15 pts — significant regression, well below 85 threshold)
/projects/screenshot-to-primevue performance 84 → 82 (-2 pts — within jitter, below 85 threshold)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.30 s, performance 69, persistently below 85 across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this single change is expected to recover 15+ performance points.
issue_title: /projects/note-structurer performance crashed to 68 (LCP 5.31 s, -15 pts); homepage LCP still critically slow at 6.30 s; /about still empty placeholder
issue_body:
## `/projects/note-structurer` performance crashed — 83 → 68 (-15 pts)

The Clinical Note Structurer page (`/projects/note-structurer`) scored **68** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-23), down from **83** yesterday — a **−15 pt drop** that far exceeds the jitter threshold. LCP jumped from **3,496 ms to 5,307 ms** (+1,811 ms), a major degradation.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/projects/note-structurer`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 68 | −15 pts (significant regression) |
| LCP | 5,307 ms | +1,811 ms (major degradation) |
| CLS | 0.084 | stable |
| TBT | 0 ms | was 90 ms (likely measurement artifact) |

### Suggested fix
Investigate what changed on this page since yesterday's deploy. The LCP nearly doubled — check for a newly added unoptimized image or asset, a blocking third-party script, or a server-side slowdown on the Cloudflare Worker backing this demo.

---

## Homepage performance remains persistently below 85 — LCP 6.30 s

The homepage (`/`) scored **69** today (up from 63, but still well below the 85 threshold). LCP has been above 6 s across every consecutive audit with no structural fix applied.

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder ("This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. Unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer.
